claim_bullets.bullet_text: In Alecrast, there are not many written languages, and many languages only have spoken words (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.157-158).
Common is the most widely used language in the world of Sword World (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.157-158).
Adventurers can learn languages through bard or sage skill levels (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.157-158).

source_record_text: This section outlines the rules for language in the Sword World RPG - Complete Edition, covering normal languages, runes, regional and racial languages, and adventurer language abilities.
